pi_items.source: Code analysis: Consistent usage across task.json description, setup_task.sh (cleanup), export_result.sh (search query), and verifier.py (validation)
Code analysis: Consistent usage in setup_task.sh (user search domain), export_result.sh (target login search), and verifier.py (expected login validation)
Code analysis: Consistent usage in setup_task.sh (crm.team search and create), export_result.sh (team member search filter), and verifier.py (team validation)

Web search + Code analysis: Odoo 17 documentation confirms sales_team.group_sale_salesman is the standard group for 'User: Own Documents Only' (basic salesperson level). Used in export_result.sh with has_group() check and in verifier.py for validation

Web search + Code analysis: Odoo 17 documentation confirms sales_team.group_sale_manager is the standard group for Administrator/Manager role (higher access level). Used in export_result.sh and verifier.py to ensure user does NOT have manager rights

privileged_info_summary: Task creates a new user 'Sarah Johnson' (sarah.johnson@yourcompany.example.com) in Odoo 17 CRM with basic salesperson access (sales_team.group_sale_salesman group, meaning 'User: Own Documents Only') and explicitly forbids manager-level access (sales_team.group_sale_manager group). The user is then added as a member of the 'Direct Sales' sales team. All group XML IDs match standard Odoo 17 sales_team module definitions. The data is synthetic - names, email, and team are created specifically for this task scenario.
